sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_datetime (id Int32, event_time String);
UPDATE test_datetime SET event_time = parseDateTime32BestEffortOrNull(event_time) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, parseDateTime32BestEffortOrNull(event_time) AS parsed_time FROM test_datetime;
SELECT id, event_time, parseDateTime32BestEffortOrNull('invalid date format') AS parsed_invalid FROM test_datetime;
